description: Recto: Legal document. Location: Fustat. Dated: Thursday, 18 Iyyar 1386 Seleucid = 7 May 1075 CE. Appointment of Efrayim b. Bashād as the beadle (khādim) of the Palestinian synagogue. He will live there with his boys and guard its property; an inventory is then given. "Like his predecessors," he will receive funds from two pesiqas each year and the payment of the capitation tax (kharāj) in full.
